ranked_matches:
Here’s the ranked list of the **TOP 10 jobs** from **BEST to WORST match** based on skill overlap, adjusted for relevance to your profile (mid-level ML/Data roles in Lahore/Pakistan):

---

### **1. AI Engineer L2 (Python ML / GenAI) at ByteCrew**
   **Match Score: 95/100**
   **Why:** Perfect fit for **Machine Learning Engineer/MLOps** roles—your **Python, Scikit-Learn, TF-IDF, Cosine Similarity, and FastAPI** align with GenAI/ML deployment needs, and **Streamlit** is a bonus for prototyping.
   **Missing:** Slightly less emphasis on traditional **Random Forest/Logistic Regression** (though still relevant), but GenAI tools (e.g., LLMs) are a **higher priority** here.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/ai-engineer-l2-%C2%B7-4%2B-years-python-ml-genai-at-bytecrew-4408958576)

---

### **2. Machine Learning Engineer - AI (Remote) at Hire Feed**
   **Match Score: 92/100**
   **Why:** **Core ML Engineer role** with **Python, Scikit-Learn, Pandas, TF-IDF, and FastAPI**—your skills match **model development + deployment** (Streamlit/FastAPI are assets).
   **Missing:** No explicit mention of **MLOps pipelines** (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes), but your **FastAPI** experience compensates.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/machine-learning-engineer-ai-remote-at-hire-feed-4434725484)

---

### **3. Artificial Intelligence Engineer, LearnWith.AI (Remote) at Crossover**
   **Match Score: 90/100**
   **Why:** **High-paying ($200K/year)** **ML Engineer** role with **Python, Scikit-Learn, and TF-IDF**—your **Streamlit/FastAPI** align with **AI tooling** (e.g., educational platforms).
   **Missing:** Requires **4+ years of experience** (you’re mid-level), but your **TF-IDF/Cosine Similarity** (NLP) and **Logistic Regression** make you competitive.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/artificial-intelligence-engineer-learnwith-ai-remote-%24200-000-year-usd-at-crossover-4431434060)

---

### **4. Data Scientist - AI/ML (Remote) at Hire Feed**
   **Match Score: 88/100**
   **Why:** **Classic Data Scientist role**—your **Python, Pandas, NumPy, Random Forest, and TF-IDF** are **directly applicable** to modeling/analysis.
   **Missing:** Lacks **MLOps/deployment focus** (Streamlit/FastAPI are underutilized here), but **remote** and **AI/ML-specific**.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-scientist-ai-ml-remote-at-hire-feed-4434924820)

---

### **5. Artificial Intelligence Specialist at Recruitzz (Lahore)**
   **Match Score: 87/100**
   **Why:** **Lahore-based** **ML Engineer** role with **Python, Scikit-Learn, and TF-IDF**—your **Cosine Similarity** (NLP) and **Logistic Regression** are **highly relevant**.
   **Missing:** No mention of **FastAPI/Streamlit** (though not critical), and **local Lahore role** may have lower pay than remote options.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/artificial-intelligence-specialist-at-recruitzz-4431505029)

---

### **6. Machine Learning Researcher (Remote) at Hire Feed**
   **Match Score: 85/100**
   **Why:** **Research-focused** but your **Python, Scikit-Learn, and Random Forest** are **foundational** for ML experiments.
   **Missing:** Requires **strong theoretical knowledge** (e.g., deep learning, research papers)—your **Streamlit/FastAPI** are **less critical** here.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/machine-learning-researcher-remote-at-hire-feed-4434488174)

---

### **7. Data Scientist (Oil & Gas Industry) at Taraki (Lahore)**
   **Match Score: 83/100**
   **Why:** **Industry-specific** (Oil & Gas) but your **Python, Pandas, and TF-IDF** are **transferable** to domain-specific modeling.
   **Missing:** **No mention of ML deployment** (Streamlit/FastAPI not required), and **industry niche** may limit flexibility.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-scientist-oil-gas-industry-codebyte-at-taraki-4432204841)

---

### **8. Machine Learning (AI) Engineer (Hybrid) at Hire Feed**
   **Match Score: 80/100**
   **Why:** **Hybrid role** with **Python, Scikit-Learn, and TF-IDF**—your **FastAPI** experience is a **plus for API-based ML**.
   **Missing:** **Less emphasis on deployment** than other Hire Feed roles, and **hybrid** may require local presence.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/machine-learning-ai-engineer-hybrid-at-hire-feed-4434724165)

---

### **9. Lead Analyst, Geospatial Data at TekMinds (Karachi)**
   **Match Score: 70/100**
   **Why:** **Pandas/NumPy + TF-IDF** are **useful for geospatial text/data**, but **not a strong fit** for your core ML skills.
   **Missing:** **Lacks Python ML libraries** (e.g., Scikit-Learn, Random Forest) and **geospatial tools** (e.g., GeoPandas, GIS).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/lead-analyst-geospatial-data-at-tekminds-international-4436319237)

---

### **10. Machine Learning (AI) Engineer (Hybrid) at Hire Feed (Duplicate)**
   **Match Score: 75/100**
   **Why:** **Same as #8**, but listed twice—**redundant** and **lower priority**.
   **Missing:** **No unique value** over other Hire Feed roles.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/machine-learning-ai-engineer-hybrid-at-hire-feed-4435514024)

---

### **Key Takeaways:**
1. **Top 3 (90%+ match)** are **AI Engineer (ByteCrew), ML Engineer (Hire Feed), and AI Engineer (Crossover)**—**prioritize these** for **highest relevance**.
2. **Lahore-based roles (Recruitzz, Taraki)** are **good but less competitive** than remote/high-paying options.
3. **Avoid geospatial (TekMinds)** unless you’re open to **relearning tools** (e.g., GIS).
4. **FastAPI/Streamlit** are **assets for MLOps/ML Engineer roles**—highlight them in applications.

**Next Steps:**
- **Tailor your resume** to emphasize **TF-IDF, Cosine Similarity, and FastAPI** for **ML Engineer** roles.
- **Apply to ByteCrew and Crossover first** (highest pay + relevance).
- **Negotiate for Lahore roles** if remote options don’t work out.
